description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a prominent bipod attached near the muzzle, suggesting it is designed for stability during sustained fire. The stock and handguard are made of wood, providing a classic appearance and ergonomic grip, while the receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, with the front sight post and rear sight both clearly visible. A detachable box magazine is fitted beneath the receiver, and the trigger guard and pistol grip are also present. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for military or paramilitary use in urban environments.
description: A long, wood-stocked rifle with a metal barrel, bipod, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, bipod legs, and front sight post.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock, pistol grip, and rear sight.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the magazine, trigger area, and bipod attachment.
